2606.27268.title: E-TTS: A New Embodied Test-Time Scaling Framework for Robotic Manipulation
2606.27268.paper_summary: Recently, a few works have made early attempts to study test-time scaling for embodied tasks. However, two major challenges remain unsolved: (1) reasoning can effectively improve the performance of the policy, but its scaling mechanism has seldom been studied; (2) historical information is essential, as embodied tasks are inherently long-horizon and sequential, making sole reliance on current observations for action scaling inadequate due to the lack of historical context utilization. To address these challenges, we introduce E-TTS, a modular and plug-and-play Embodied Test-Time Scaling framework that unifies reasoning and action scaling for robotic manipulation via history-aware iterative refinement with vision-language verifiers. To support joint reasoning-action scaling, E-TTS performs reasoning-action joint sampling and scoring in a pairwise manner. To better utilize historical information, E-TTS uses a history buffer to store historical context, which is then used by reasoning and action verifiers to evaluate the sampled candidates. Unlike conventional open-loop TTS methods, E-TTS introduces feedback generation into the sampling process to form a closed-loop iterative refinement mechanism, enhancing both inference efficiency and environmental adaptability. Each component functions as an independent and composable module, allowing flexible and adaptive configuration depending on task requirements. To evaluate the advantages of our framework, we conduct experiments across 4 different benchmarks, 6 environments, 3 embodiments, and 4 base vision-language-action models. The experimental results demonstrate that, without requiring additional expert data collection or retraining, E-TTS consistently improves performance, achieving up to a 33.14% increase in simulation and 26.62% in real-world scenarios.
2606.27268.paper_summary_zh: 最近，一些研究對於具身任務的測試時間擴展進行了早期嘗試。<lb/>然而，仍然存在兩個主要挑戰未得到解決：（1）推理可以有效提高策略的性能，但其擴展機制鮮有研究；（2）歷史信息至關重要，因為具身任務本質上是長期的和序列性的，僅依賴當前觀察來進行行動擴展是不足夠的，因為缺乏歷史上下文的利用。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了E-TTS，一個模組化且即插即用的具身測試時間擴展框架，通過具歷史感知的迭代精煉與視覺-語言驗證器統一推理和行動擴展。<lb/>為了支持聯合推理-行動擴展，E-TTS以成對的方式進行推理-行動聯合採樣和評分。<lb/>為了更好地利用歷史信息，E-TTS使用歷史緩衝區來存儲歷史上下文，然後由推理和行動驗證器用來評估採樣的候選者。<lb/>與傳統的開環TTS方法不同，E-TTS在採樣過程中引入了反饋生成，以形成閉環的迭代精煉機制，增強了推理效率和環境適應性。<lb/>每個組件作為獨立且可組合的模組運行，根據任務需求允許靈活和自適應的配置。<lb/>為了評估我們框架的優勢，我們在4個不同的基準、6個環境、3個具身體現和4個基礎視覺-語言-行動模型上進行了實驗。<lb/>實驗結果表明，在不需要額外專家數據收集或重新訓練的情況下，E-TTS始終提高性能，在模擬中達到最高33.14%的增長，在現實場景中達到26.62%的增長。
2606.27268.author: Wen Ye et.al.
2606.27268.authors: Wen Ye, Peiyan Li, Tingyu Yuan, Yuan Xu, Xiangnan Wu, Chaoyang Zhao, Jing Liu, Nianfeng Liu, Yan Huang, Liang Wang
